RTS Student Atakan Yılmaz’s Short Film is Winning International Accolades!

The short film “Hello Mom, It’s Me, Lou Lou”, written and directed by Atakan Yılmaz, a student of our Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, continues to appear in important festivals around the world.

The film had its European premiere at the 47th Clermont-Ferrand International Short Film Festival. Held from January 31 to February 8, 2024 in Clermont-Ferrand, France, the festival is known as one of the most prestigious events in the short film world.

“Hi, Mom, it’s me, Lou Lou” also:

29th Turkey/Germany Film Festival (Nuremberg) Short Film Competition Second Prize,

At the 21st Akbank Short Film Festival, he was selected for the Festival Shorts section.

Other achievements of the movie during 2024 are as follows:

4th Luma Short Film Festival, Short Film Competition – Special Jury Award

31st Adana Golden Boll Film Festival, International Short Film Competition – Finalist

11th Uşak Short Film Festival, National Short Film Competition – Finalist

25th Izmir Short Film Festival, National Fiction Film Competition – Finalist

14th Crime and Punishment Film Festival, Short Film Competition – Finalist

We congratulate Atakan Yılmaz for his impressive achievements and wish him the best of luck!
